ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor company */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the vendor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the vendor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the vendor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network device */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vendor of the device */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Model name of the device */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the device */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access available (e.g., Telnet, HTTP) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., router, switch) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., online, offline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_devices_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the device model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device associated with the account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the device */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for accessing the device */,
  "privileges" TEXT /* Access privileges assigned to the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "privileges" (
  "privilege_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each privilege */,
  "privilege_name" TEXT /* Name of the privilege (e.g., Administrator, User) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the privilege entails */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("privilege_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the device */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, configuration change) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device associated with the configuration */,
  "config_data" TEXT /* Configuration data (e.g., settings, parameters) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was last updated */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration (e.g., initial, modified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configurations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., timeout, max_users) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., unauthorized access) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed message regarding the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been resolved or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device related to the note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note or remark */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
